mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEWNO, R.USERNO, R.COMMENTA, R.CREATEDAT, R.CONTENTTYPE, R.CONTENTNO, M.USERNAME AS USERNAME, F.REVIEWFILEURL AS photoUrl FROM REVIEW R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.USERNO = M.USERNO LEFT JOIN REVIEW_FILE F ON R.REVIEWNO = F.REVIEWNO WHERE R.CONTENTNO = #{contentNo} ORDER BY R.CREATEDAT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT review_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO REVIEW (REVIEWNO, USERNO, COMMENTA, CREATEDAT, CONTENTTYPE, CONTENTNO) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{userNo}, #{commentA}, SYSDATE, #{contentType}, #{contentNo})
INSERT INTO REVIEW_FILE (REVIEWFILENO, REVIEWNO, REVIEWFILEURL) VALUES (review_file_seq.nextval, #{reviewNo}, #{photoUrl})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM REVIEW WHERE REVIEWNO = #{reviewNo} AND USERNO = #{userNo}
